excluded: acceptance of credit attestation or exact live-run approval
creation of a runnable live-submit command
a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: reduced-scope all-lanes 2048-shot interpretation boundary is preregistered before credit attestation
all comparator families, both IBM seeds, both templates, and all rows remain required
lower-precision caveats and disallowed interpretations are explicit before hardware results exist

disallowed_interpretations: claiming equivalence to the full 4096-shot Stage190 package
dropping any comparator family after hardware results are known
using the 512-shot scout boundary for robustness claims
treating directional seed577-only evidence as independent-seed replication
changing thresholds after hardware counts are collected

pass_fail_policy.lower_precision_caveat: A win at 2048 shots can support a reduced-precision hardware positive, but it cannot be described as the original 4096-shot evidentiary run. Any marginal result below 2 shot quanta is inconclusive, not a loss or win.

interpretation_boundary.selected_lanes: all four Stage189/190 IBM replacement lanes

next_gate: Use this reduced-scope boundary in the next cost/attestation packet. If the user attests credit allowance, rerun Stage194/195 against the reduced scope before preparing any live runner.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.

preregistration_items.description: Reduced-scope preregistration requires Stage197 to recommend a reduced scope before credit attestation.
Selected reduced scope must be frozen before any credit attestation or live-runner preparation.

evidence.description: All selected IBM lanes and families, all 16 rows, 2048 shots per row.
evidence.rationale: Preserves coverage but halves shot resolution; weakest simulated positional margin falls near 2.6 shot quanta.

preregistration_items.description: Reduced precision claim boundary, thresholds, and exclusions are frozen before hardware results exist.

disallowed_interpretations: claiming equivalence to the full 4096-shot Stage190 package
dropping any comparator family after hardware results are known
using the 512-shot scout boundary for robustness claims
treating directional seed577-only evidence as independent-seed replication
changing thresholds after hardware counts are collected

pass_fail_policy.lower_precision_caveat: A win at 2048 shots can support a reduced-precision hardware positive, but it cannot be described as the original 4096-shot evidentiary run. Any marginal result below 2 shot quanta is inconclusive, not a loss or win.

evidence.selected_lanes: all four Stage189/190 IBM replacement lanes

preregistration_items.description: This preregistration does not verify IBM credit allowance and does not accept exact live-run approval.

selected_scope.description: All selected IBM lanes and families, all 16 rows, 2048 shots per row.
selected_scope.rationale: Preserves coverage but halves shot resolution; weakest simulated positional margin falls near 2.6 shot quanta.
